label: 2 m
notes: 2 m half of a VHF/UHF LEO satellite pair. RHCP, self-phased crossed loops with a drooping radial reflector to favor high-elevation passes. Round tubing. Targets: axial ratio < 3 dB over the coverage cone, VSWR < 1.5 after matching. Reflector count, spacing, and droop left for the optimizer.

input.label: 2 m
input.notes: 2 m half of a VHF/UHF LEO satellite pair. RHCP, self-phased crossed loops with a drooping radial reflector to favor high-elevation passes. Round tubing. Targets: axial ratio < 3 dB over the coverage cone, VSWR < 1.5 after matching. Reflector count, spacing, and droop left for the optimizer.

search.objective: fewest radials meeting AR and VSWR, then minimize match cost
